evidence.beauty: Fluent academic Ukrainian with tight arcs from labor and body to obzhynky, poetics, and evidence limits.
evidence.decolonization: Social-address/decolonization section resists decorative ethnography and over-symbolizing; no Russian-imperial frame.
evidence.engagement: Four short public primary texts, inline activities, and useful tip/note/important callouts anchor the lesson.
evidence.m06_short_song: Short Жали женчики, жали text demoted to supplementary citation; structured readings now use three substantial harvest/obzhynky passages.
evidence.naturalness: Learner-facing AI/build/register leakage cleanup keeps the prose in Ukrainian seminar register without process instructions.
evidence.pedagogical: Repeatable method: row, action, object, addressee, and bounded conclusion, with model answers and rubric.
evidence.reading_reread: M3-M6 reread enforces substantial on-site PrimaryReading passages; one-line/token readings no longer satisfy the FOLK reading gate. Claude Opus closeout review-folk-reading-reread-m3-m6-closeout returned SHIP-READY.
evidence.review: Claude route was attempted first; AGY/Gemini fallback review blockers were fixed before final validation.
evidence.tone: Serious Ukrainian teaching voice keeps labor, fatigue, hierarchy, humor, and community visible without sentimentality.
